---
title: "AIC_fits"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/AIC_fits.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_fits.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `f1` {#f1}

```python
def f1(a, c1, c2)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_fits.py#L25){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `f2` {#f2}

```python
def f2(a, c1, c2)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_fits.py#L28){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `f3` {#f3}

```python
def f3(a, c1, c2)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_fits.py#L31){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
